description: Native American English, Detroit, with a Nigerian-American household cadence underneath. Female, late 40s. Studio-clear, professional. Persona: community-clinic director. Emotion: controlled, exacting, compassionate. A low, even alto that carries authority without volume; plain, declarative delivery with deliberate, unwasted pacing. When her anger rises she goes quieter and more precise, never louder, the calm a frightened patient cannot read.
text: [tired] Long shift, Eli, so I'll be plain. Don't tell me what the system meant to do. [serious] Tell me who it left outside my door tonight... and what you intend to do about it.
